name: The Akron-Summit County Public Library
message: The Akron-Summit County Public Library is an organization dedicated to providing reading, learning and other opportunities and programs for members of the community. Soon there will be another opportunity for customers of this library and others who are interested: you will be able to review any staff document for free. Keep in mind that your documents may be there, too. This informationand the rest of the internal library will be available here shortly.
